languages.text: "Я повторю эксперимент. Возможно в новой конфигурации мне удастся его стабилизировать..."
"I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."
languages.original_text: "Я повторю эксперимент. Возможно в новой конфигурации мне удастся его стабилизировать..."

traits.locale_text: "I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."
"I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."
"I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."

languages.text: 「実験を繰り返す。新たな構成で彼を安定させることができるかもしれない…」
languages.original_text: "I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."

traits.locale_text: 「実験を繰り返す。新たな構成で彼を安定させることができるかもしれない…」

languages.text: “我会重复实验。或许换一种构型就能使他稳定……”
languages.original_text: "I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."

traits.locale_text: “我会重复实验。或许换一种构型就能使他稳定……”

languages.text: « Je vais réitérer l'expérience. Une nouvelle configuration me permettra peut-être de le stabiliser... »
languages.original_text: "I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."

traits.locale_text: « Je vais réitérer l'expérience. Une nouvelle configuration me permettra peut-être de le stabiliser... »

languages.text: «Repetiré el experimento. Tal vez pueda estabilizarlo con una nueva configuración...».
languages.original_text: "I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."

traits.locale_text: «Repetiré el experimento. Tal vez pueda estabilizarlo con una nueva configuración...».

languages.text: "Deneyi tekrarlayacağım. Belki onu yeni bir konfigürasyonda stabilize edebilirim..."
languages.original_text: "I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."

traits.locale_text: "Deneyi tekrarlayacağım. Belki onu yeni bir konfigürasyonda stabilize edebilirim..."

languages.text: "Ich werde das Experiment wiederholen. Vielleicht kann ich ihn in einer neuen Konfiguration stabilisieren ..."
languages.original_text: "I will repeat the experiment. Perhaps I will be able to stabilise him in a new configuration..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde das Experiment wiederholen. Vielleicht kann ich ihn in einer neuen Konfiguration stabilisieren ..."
